description: Redesign the Findings tab to be the center of value. Create a new FindingCard component with severity badge, clear title, file/location, why it matters, suggested fix, and copyable task. Replace the grid layout with a readable vertical list. Put filters inside a collapsed 'Filter findings' disclosure control. Also redesign the Review History page (sessions list) to feel like a list of repo reports.
steps: Create src/components/workspace/FindingCard.tsx - a redesigned finding card for the Findings tab. Each card must display: severity badge (Critical/High/Medium/Low - derive from artifact type 'risk' severity or type mapping: risk=high, decision=medium, tradeoff=medium, assumption=low, open-question=low, recommendation=medium), clear title, file/location (parse from artifact.content if it contains file paths), 'Why it matters' section (from artifact.content), 'Suggested fix' section (from artifact.content for recommendations, or from title context), and a 'Copy task' button that copies a formatted task string suitable for a coding agent. Use the finding card styling from the landing page sample report (the border-colored severity cards). Keep a calm vertical layout - not a dense 2-column grid.

Rewrite the findings tab content in WorkspaceLayout.tsx (the activeTab === 'findings' section). Replace the current grid layout with a vertical list of FindingCard components. Move the filter selects (type, status) into a collapsed disclosure: a button labeled 'Filter findings' that toggles a panel with the filters. By default filters are hidden. Show a count of findings at the top. Remove ClarificationPanel and InterventionPanel from the findings tab (move those to Technical Activity or Overview as appropriate).

Redesign src/components/session/SessionsTable.tsx to feel like a report history list. Each row/card shows: repo name or review title (from session.title or problemDescription), review type (if derivable), status badge, date (using timeAgo), finding count if available (not currently in the list API but show if present), and primary action 'Open report' or 'Continue analysis' depending on status. Reduce prominence of 'Pass' column - show it as small metadata like '2 review passes' instead of a prominent column. Make the mobile ReviewCard also match this pattern.
Update the sessions page header in src/app/sessions/page.tsx: change title to 'Review history' and description to 'Your repo review reports. Click one to see the full report.'
acceptance_criteria: Findings tab displays cards in a vertical list, not a grid
Each FindingCard shows severity, title, location, explanation, fix, and copy button
Filters are hidden behind a collapsed 'Filter findings' disclosure by default
Review history page shows repo-report-focused cards without prominent Pass column
Review history cards have 'Open report' / 'Continue analysis' as primary action text
Build passes with no new errors
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/movistan && npx prisma generate && npx next build` - must pass
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/movistan && npx vitest run` - no NEW test failures introduced
